Izzy MG

Web, LMS & LX

Hi! I'm a New Zealand based web developer and e-learning specialist. I work with learning management systems and the web, often through the lens of online learning and accessibility. I'm also a full stack developer.

  • JS, HTML, CSS, related tech
  • Node, Golang, Docker
  • Learning Management Systems

I'm currently administrating a Totara instance for a global e-learning provider based in New Zealand.
